Package me.sytex.stylize

Class Stylize

java.lang.Object
me.sytex.stylize.Stylize
public final class Stylize extends Object
A utility class for styling text using MiniMessage, PlaceholderAPI and MiniPlaceholders.
This class provides methods to convert strings into styled components and send them to players.

  • Nested Class Summary

      resolvers - additional tag resolvers

      the styled Component

    • sendTitle

      public void sendTitle(@NotNull @NotNull net.kyori.adventure.audience.Audience audience, @NotNull @NotNull String title, @NotNull @NotNull String subTitle, @Nullable @Nullable net.kyori.adventure.text.minimessage.tag.resolver.TagResolver... resolvers)
      Sends a translated title and subtitle to the specified audience with default timings.
      Parameters:
      audience - the audience to send the title to
      title - the title to translate and send
      subTitle - the subtitle to translate and send
      resolvers - optional tag resolvers for translation

    • sendTitle

      public void sendTitle(@NotNull @NotNull net.kyori.adventure.audience.Audience audience, @NotNull @NotNull String title, @NotNull @NotNull String subTitle, @NotNull @NotNull Duration fadeIn, @NotNull @NotNull Duration fadeOut, @Nullable @Nullable net.kyori.adventure.text.minimessage.tag.resolver.TagResolver... resolvers)
      Sends a translated title and subtitle to the specified audience with custom fade-in and fade-out timings.
      Parameters:
      audience - the audience to send the title to
      title - the title to translate and send
      subTitle - the subtitle to translate and send
      fadeIn - the duration for the title to fade in
      fadeOut - the duration for the title to fade out
      resolvers - optional tag resolvers for translation

    • sendTitle

      public void sendTitle(@NotNull @NotNull net.kyori.adventure.audience.Audience audience, @NotNull @NotNull String title, @NotNull @NotNull String subTitle, @NotNull @NotNull Duration fadeIn, @NotNull @NotNull Duration stay, @NotNull @NotNull Duration fadeOut, @Nullable @Nullable net.kyori.adventure.text.minimessage.tag.resolver.TagResolver... resolvers)
      Sends a translated title and subtitle to the specified audience with custom timings.
      Parameters:
      audience - the audience to send the title to
      title - the title to translate and send
      subTitle - the subtitle to translate and send
      fadeIn - the duration for the title to fade in
      stay - the duration for the title to stay on screen
      fadeOut - the duration for the title to fade out
      resolvers - optional tag resolvers for translation

    • sendTitlePart

      public void sendTitlePart(@NotNull @NotNull net.kyori.adventure.audience.Audience audience, @NotNull @NotNull net.kyori.adventure.title.TitlePart titlePart, @NotNull @NotNull String string, @Nullable @Nullable net.kyori.adventure.text.minimessage.tag.resolver.TagResolver... resolvers)
      Sends a translated title part to the specified audience with default timings.
      Parameters:
      audience - the audience to send the title part to
      titlePart - the part of the title to send
      string - the text to translate and send
      resolvers - optional tag resolvers for translation

      string - the text to translate and send

      fadeOut - the duration for the title part to fade out
